Documentation

ClawOps Docs

Everything you need to set up, operate, and scale your ClawOps workspace. From first login to advanced agent orchestration — covered here.

Quick Start
What is OpenClaw?
Connect a social account
Spawn an AI worker
Install a skill
Open Chrome VNC
Set up GHL integration
Getting Started
Setup & Onboarding
Sign up, configure your profile, and take your first steps.
Platform
OpenClaw Agent OS
What OpenClaw is, how it runs, and how to talk to your agent.
Gateway
How agents connect, what tools are available, and health monitoring.
AI Agents
AI Agent Teams
Create multi-agent teams with manager and employee roles.
Spawning Workers
Create temporary workers for parallel, task-specific work.
Core Features
CRM
Manage contacts, deals, and your sales pipeline.
Social Media
Connect accounts, compose, schedule, and analyze.
Browser & Tools
Browser Automation
Chrome VNC, camoufox, session persistence, anti-detection.
Skills
Browse and install pre-built agent skills.
MCP Servers & Plugins
Enable MCP servers from Smithery and configure plugins.
Integrations
Composio Setup
Connect Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram for social automation.
GoHighLevel (GHL)
CRM integration — contacts, pipeline, email, and tasks.
N8N Automation
Visual workflow builder with AI agent node and webhooks.
Browser Automation
Chrome VNC, camoufox, session persistence.
Pro tip: Each page has an FAQ at the bottom. If you still have questions, use the @agent mention in the dashboard to ask your AI agent directly.
